_note: SYNTHETIC fixture — fabricated worst-case scan for the homepage widget (priority list #45). Uses the reserved .example TLD so no real business is referenced. Regenerate against a real consented seed list by running: `python scripts/pick_worst_dental.py --api-base <prod>`. The script overwrites this file.
breach_cost_summary: Sector baseline (~$4,880,000) from IBM-style averages; multiple critical-class exposures materially increase the likelihood and cost of an incident.
findings_plain: Hudson Rock infostealer intelligence reports 2,147 stealer-related record(s) tied to your domain. That usually means malware on a device exfiltrated passwords or session data.
Patient intake PDF directory is publicly indexable — documents containing names and DOBs reachable without login.
Admin login page reachable over plain HTTP (no HSTS preload, no redirect).
DMARC p=none — monitoring only; increase to quarantine/reject.
SPF uses softfail (~all) — acceptable; consider -all when every sender is known.
Quick pass found 284 hostnames for this domain. A wider footprint usually means more surface area — review anything you do not recognize.
Exposed phpMyAdmin at /phpmyadmin responds 200 without IP allow-list.
jQuery 3.3.1 in use — below current LTS, multiple known XSS issues.
DKIM key found for a common selector.
